subcodes.first_line: At this moment, this servant standeth before the Throne of his Lord, and this Most Great Glad-Tidings floweth forth and streameth from the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین این عبد امام کرسی رب حاضر و این بشارت کبری از قلم اعلی جاری و ساری
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
